title: 第1節　朝霧橋の上
continuityNotes: This is the Sera-part of the same bridge incident as scene-001-002-001-sato.
Keep the same bridge, same stair landing, and same morning wind as the paired image.
Sato must remain an unaware background runner further along the bridge and must keep facing his route rather than the incident.
prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第1章　朝の河畔 / 第2話　川風に乗る. Scene focus: 第1節　朝霧橋の上 / セラパート. Summary: 橋の踊り場では、清掃作業員を装った男が滑り止めシートの端へ透明な被膜剤を塗っていた。もう一人は階段の陰で、転倒した標的へぶつかる役を待っている。橋は風があるぶん、わずかな足裏の… Key beats: 橋の踊り場では、清掃作業員を装った男が滑り止めシートの端へ透明な被膜剤を塗っていた。もう一人は階段の陰で、転倒した標的へぶつかる役を待っている。橋は風があるぶん、わずかな足裏の違和感でも体勢を崩しやすい。だから選んだのだろうが、選ぶ場所としてはあまりに安直だった。 セラは欄干の影へ体を沿わせたまま、その被膜の照り返しを見た。朝の光は工作の粗さをよく映す。彼女はジャケットの袖口を軽く引き上げ、踊り場へ向かう人波の死角へ入った。 「風のいい橋を、転ぶ場所にしないでください」 被膜剤のノズルへ踵をひとつ入れる。中身は舗装へこぼれず、作業員の手元だけが狂う。振り返った男の手首へ白手袋が絡み、そのまま欄干の支柱へ押しつけられた。階段側の男が出てきた瞬間には、セラの肘が喉元の少し下を打ち、息だけを奪う。二人は清掃器具の陰へ折りたたまれ、遠目には休憩中の作業員にしか見えない。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sera-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sera-part of the same bridge incident as scene-001-002-001-sato. Keep the same bridge, same stair landing, and same morning wind as the paired image. Sato must remain an unaware background runner further along the bridge and must keep facing his route rather than the incident. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a cute maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Create a tense bridge-stair action image with Sera dominant, stopping saboteurs around a stair landing or anti-slip surface while still visibly dressed for a spring run. Keep Sato smaller in the background, simply running onward and unaware.
